summary: Revenue & Expense Core Backend - All 25 tests passed. Phase 1-4 endpoints fully operational: Client Acts CRUD/confirm, Labor Cost aggregation, Execution Packages generation/update, Project Profit Summary with revenue/expense/profit breakdowns.
seed_data_creation: Test created draft/accepted client acts with TEST_ prefix. Execution packages updated with progress data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revenue & Expense Core Backend (4 phases) fully tested. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT /api/client-acts, POST /api/client-acts/from-offer/{id}, POST /api/client-acts/{id}/confirm, GET /api/labor-cost/by-project/{id}, POST/GET/PUT /api/execution-packages, POST /api/execution-packages/from-offer/{id}, GET /api/project-profit/{id}. Project PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da) has 2 accepted acts (earned ~2500), 3 execution packages, material cost 43.2, labor cost 0 (no work reports). Profit calculation uses earned revenue when available.

P1: POST /api/client-acts creates draft.notes: Creates draft act with calculated line totals, subtotal, VAT, and total

P1: POST /api/client-acts/from-offer/{id.notes: Generates act lines from offer with configurable execution percent

P1: POST /api/client-acts/{id}/confirm c.notes: Sets status=Accepted, records accepted_at and accepted_by

P1: PUT /api/client-acts/{id} updates dr.notes: Recalculates line_total, executed_percent, subtotal, VAT, total

P2: Labor cost returns by_employee and b.notes: Both breakdowns have correct structure with hours and cost

P3: POST /api/execution-packages/from-of.notes: Creates execution packages from offer lines with budget calculations

P3: GET /api/execution-packages?project_.notes: Returns list of packages with all required fields

P3: Duplicate generation prevented (retu.notes: Returns 400 with 'already exist' error for duplicate generation

P4: GET /api/project-profit/{id} returns.notes: Comprehensive summary with all required sections

P4: Expenses has material/labor/subcontr.notes: All 4 categories + total present, total verified as sum

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints using real backend
